URL: https://github.com/KelvinTegelaar/CIPP-API
Language: powershell

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Micke-K/IntuneManagement
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Micke-K/IntuneManagement
Language: powershell
Copy, export, import, delete, document and compare policies and profiles in Intune and Azure with PowerShell script and WPF UI. Import ADMX files and registry settings with ADMX ingestion. View and edit PowerShell script.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MicrosoftDocs/azure-ai-docs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MicrosoftDocs/azure-ai-docs
Language: powershell
Open Source Azure AI documentation including, azure ai, azure studio, machine learning, genomics, open-datasets, and search

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jemishavasoya/dev-cleaner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jemishavasoya/dev-cleaner
Language: powershell
🧹 One-click interactive shell script to safely deep clean development caches (Xcode, Flutter, FVM, Android, npm, Gradle, IDEs) on macOS & Linux. Recover 50GB+ of storage instantly

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: powershell

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mandiant/flare-vm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mandiant/flare-vm
Language: powershell
A collection of software installations scripts for Windows systems that allows you to easily setup and maintain a reverse engineering environment on a VM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/ARI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/ARI
Language: powershell
Azure Resource Inventory - It's a Powerful tool to create EXCEL inventory from Azure Resources with low effort

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/Agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/Agents
Language: powershell
The Microsoft 365 Agent SDK simplifies building full stack, multichannel, trusted agents for platforms including M365, Teams, Copilot Studio, and Webchat.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/fabric-toolbox

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoftarchive/New-KrbtgtKeys.ps1
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoftarchive/New-KrbtgtKeys.ps1
Language: powershell
This script will enable you to reset the krbtgt account password and related keys while minimizing the likelihood of Kerberos authentication issues being caused by the operation.
